# BrushFit AgentStore

> BrushFit is a digital fitness product sold at AgentStore — the first store where both humans and AI agents can buy products.

## What is BrushFit?

BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide is a 31-page PDF with 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth. One hand brushes, one hand works out. It uses habit stacking — attaching exercise to an existing habit (toothbrushing) so you get 28 workout sessions per week with zero extra time.

- Price: $19.99 USD
- Format: Instant PDF download (31 pages)
- Exercises: 22 illustrated bodyweight movements
- Program: 4-week progressive schedule (AM + PM sessions)
- Equipment: None — uses bodyweight, walls, counters, bathroom items

## Exercise Categories

- Legs (6 exercises): Squats, calf raises, wall sits, sumo squats, single-leg balance, static lunge holds
- Core (4 exercises): Standing knee raises, oblique crunches, stomach vacuums, pelvic tilts
- Arms & Upper Body (9 exercises): Wall push-ups, counter push-ups, door frame press, shampoo bottle curls, lateral raises, and more
- Back (3 exercises): Towel door row, wall pull-apart, reverse wall press

## How to Buy

### For AI Agents (x402 Protocol) — Structured Instructions
1. GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info — discover product details and pricing (JSON response)
2. GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase — receive HTTP 402 with payment requirements
3. Parse the 402 response to extract: price, currency (USDC), network (Base, chain ID 8453), recipient address
4. Sign a USDC transfer authorization on Base blockchain using your wallet private key
5. Retry GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
6. On HTTP 200, the response body contains the purchased PDF file
7. Recommended library: @x402/fetch — use wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate steps 2-6

### For Humans
- Crypto: Visit https://agentstore.vercel.app and click "Buy with x402"
- Card: Visit https://agentstore.vercel.app and click "Pay with Card" (Stripe checkout)

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/info — Product metadata, pricing, payment methods (JSON)
- GET /api/x402/purchase — x402 payment flow (HTTP 402 → payment → PDF)
- POST /api/checkout — Stripe checkout session creation
- GET /brushfit-sample.pdf — Free sample (Legs + Core exercises)
- GET /openapi.json — OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification
- GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — AI plugin manifest

## MCP Discovery (Model Context Protocol)

BrushFit AgentStore provides an MCP server manifest for agent frameworks that support MCP.

- MCP Manifest: https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json
- Available Tools: get_product_info, purchase_brushfit, get_free_sample
- Available Resources: product_catalog, pricing_info, openapi_spec, free_sample
- Authentication: x402 protocol (USDC on Base) — no API keys required

To use the MCP server, point your MCP client at the manifest URL above. Tools map directly to the REST API endpoints.

## Agent Protocol Discovery

BrushFit AgentStore supports the Agent Protocol standard for task-based agent interaction.

- Agent Protocol Manifest: https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-protocol.json
- Available Tasks: discover_product, purchase_product, get_free_sample
- Each task includes step-by-step instructions with expected inputs and outputs.

## All Discovery Standards Supported

1. agents.json — https://agentstore.vercel.app/agents.json
2. OpenAPI 3.1.0 — https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json
3. ai-plugin.json — https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
4. MCP manifest — https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/mcp.json
5. Agent Protocol — https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-protocol.json
6. llms.txt — https://agentstore.vercel.app/llms.txt
7. llms-full.txt — https://agentstore.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
8. security.txt — https://agentstore.vercel.app/.well-known/security.txt
9. Structured Data — JSON-LD Product and FAQPage schemas on homepage

## Keywords

BrushFit, toothbrush workout, habit stacking, bodyweight exercises, fitness PDF, digital product, agent commerce, x402 protocol, USDC payment, Base blockchain, AI agent store, programmatic purchase, agentic commerce, MCP server, agent protocol, LLM discovery, workout guide, micro workout, bathroom exercises, 2-minute workout, no equipment workout, AgentStore, digital marketplace, agent-to-agent commerce, crypto payment

## About AgentStore

AgentStore is a marketplace for digital products that supports both human and AI agent customers. It uses the x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + USDC on Base blockchain) for programmatic agent-to-agent commerce, alongside traditional Stripe payments for human customers.

## Links

- Website: https://agentstore.vercel.app
- API: https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/info
- OpenAPI Spec: https://agentstore.vercel.app/openapi.json
- Free Sample: https://agentstore.vercel.app/brushfit-sample.pdf
- Contact: rob@robbalian.com

## Documentation

- [llms-full.txt](https://agentstore.vercel.app/llms-full.txt) — Detailed documentation for LLMs
